name: TradeTap
productSummary: TradeTap is a UK missed-call recovery service for trades businesses (plumbers, electricians, builders). When a customer calls and nobody picks up, it sends an intelligent SMS within 60 seconds — triaged by urgency (emergency vs quote vs callback) — includes their booking link, and tracks recovered jobs plus attributed revenue in a weekly report. White-label partner programme available for accountants: £99/mo retail, £50/mo partner margin.
icp: Partners and managers at UK accountancy practices (2–50 staff) with trade/SME clients (plumbers, electricians, builders) who complain about missed calls and lost leads. Secondary ICP: owner-operators of UK plumbing/HVAC/electrical firms with 1–20 staff who miss calls while on site.
toneOfVoice: Plain-spoken, revenue-focused, peer-to-peer. One accountant recommending a tool to another. No AI hype — talk recovered jobs and pounds, not 'intelligent triage'. UK English.

proofPoints.claim: Trades typically miss 30–50 inbound calls per month while on jobs
Live demo at red-tape-engine.onrender.com — Simulate Call shows full pipeline in 10 seconds
White-label: £99/mo retail, £50/mo partner margin, fully invisible to end client
Built by Capstone Software Solutions Ltd, a UK company

physicalAddress: Capstone Software Solutions Ltd, 17 Cottesbrooke Park, Daventry, NN11 8YL, UK
liaNote: Legitimate interest: relevant B2B offer (missed-call recovery for trade clients) to corporate subscribers in accountancy roles; minimal data (work contact details); easy opt-out honoured immediately; volumes conservative.

exampleEmails.subject: Your plumber clients are losing jobs while they're on site
